mapper.insert: INSERT INTO leaderboard (tenant_id, name, start_time, end_time, sort_order, max_query_users, allow_duplicate_report, allow_history_query, roll_strategy, roll_interval_value, roll_interval_unit, roll_user_count, status, create_by, update_by) VALUES (#{tenantId}, #{name}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{sortOrder}, #{maxQueryUsers}, #{allowDuplicateReport}, #{allowHistoryQuery}, #{rollStrategy}, #{rollIntervalValue}, #{rollIntervalUnit}, #{rollUserCount}, 'active', #{createBy}, #{updateBy})
mapper.update: UPDATE leaderboard SET name = #{name}, start_time = #{startTime}, end_time = #{endTime}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, max_query_users = #{maxQueryUsers}, allow_duplicate_report = #{allowDuplicateReport}, allow_history_query = #{allowHistoryQuery}, roll_strategy = #{rollStrategy}, roll_interval_value = #{rollIntervalValue}, roll_interval_unit = #{rollIntervalUnit}, roll_user_count = #{rollUserCount}, update_by = #{updateBy} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM leaderboard WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT * FROM leaderboard ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT * FROM leaderboard ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT * FROM leaderboard WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM leaderboard WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId}
